passes.description: HAVING subquery: SUM(value) per cik, compute AVG as threshold

scan.zone_map_filter: skip block if zm[b].min_uom > usd_code || zm[b].max_uom < usd_code

aggregation.output: cik_sum map + scalar total_sum + scalar group_count

passes.description: Main query: SUM(value) per adsh_code (uniquely determines name+cik)

scan.zone_map_filter: skip block if zm[b].min_uom > usd_code || zm[b].max_uom < usd_code

join_order.notes: adsh_code IS the sub row index; O(1) array lookup sub_fy[adsh_code] == 2022. No hash join needed.
O(1) lookup sub_cik[adsh_code] for pass1 group key.

filters.notes: usd_code loaded from indexes/uom_codes.bin at startup
sub_fy flat array (172KB) fits in L1 cache; array lookup per num row

data_structures.sub_fy_array: flat_array(int16_t[86135]) — loaded once, reused both passes
data_structures.sub_cik_array: flat_array(int32_t[86135]) — loaded once, reused both passes
data_structures.sub_name_offsets: flat_array(uint32_t[86136]) — loaded once, decoded at output
data_structures.sub_name_data: char[] — loaded once, indexed via name_offsets at output

parallelism.notes: Both passes use block-level morsels (395 blocks each). Each thread owns a thread-local hash map; maps are merged after scan. Zone map check is single-threaded pre-scan to build skip-list.

indexes.notes: Applied identically in both passes; precompute block skip-list once and reuse
Load at startup to resolve usd_code (int8_t)

output.decode_step: for each surviving adsh_code: name = name_data[name_offsets[a]..name_offsets[a+1]], cik = sub_cik[a]
